description_long: This church features a tall, slender spire with a golden tip rising above a rectangular nave, flanked by a prominent bell tower and a secondary dome with a smaller golden spire. The facade is adorned with classical columns and arched windows, while the main entrance is sheltered by a portico. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored stone or stucco, with a dark gray roof and gold accents on the domes and spire. The side elevations reveal a series of evenly spaced windows and a secondary entrance beneath the dome. The rear of the church displays a large circular window and additional architectural detailing. The overall design is ornate, with Baroque influences evident in the domes, spire, and decorative elements.
description: An ornate church with a tall golden spire, a secondary dome, classical columns, and arched windows, featuring Baroque architectural details and gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a portico, the tall central spire, and symmetrical facade details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated nave, the bell tower with spire, and the secondary dome with a smaller golden spire.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large circular window, the dome, and the back architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the nave, bell tower, and dome, with clear visibility of the side windows and secondary entrance.
